name: Outreach Pipeline
description: Lead tracking and outreach pipeline for autonomous sales. Manages leads through identification, contact, negotiation, and conversion with full contact history and follow-up scheduling.

maxLeads.description: Maximum number of leads to store.

overdueAlertDays.description: Days after nextActionDate before a lead is flagged as overdue.

dataDir.label: Data Directory
dataDir.help: Where lead data is stored locally.

maxLeads.label: Max Leads
maxLeads.help: Maximum number of leads the plugin will track.

overdueAlertDays.label: Overdue Alert Days
overdueAlertDays.help: How many days past the follow-up date before flagging as overdue.
